mapper.sql: id, position_code, position_name, sort, status, description, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_position_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT FROM sys_position_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND position_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{positionCode}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_position_info SET position_code = #{positionCode}, position_name = #{positionName}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_position_info SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
